a.xlink:title: ConfigDialog::ConfigDialog this sets up the configuration screen.
ImitatePass::executeGit easy wrapper for running git commands.
ImitatePass::GitCommit commit a file to git with an appropriate commit message.
ImitatePass::Insert create new file with encrypted content.
QtPass::init make sure we are ready to go as soon as possible.
MainWindow::MainWindow handles all of the main functionality and also the main window.
